summary: Channel processing produced activity but lacks a reviewable rendered-routing fixture.

claims.claim: The channel-processing scope needs a concrete fixture tying inbound messages to the routed workflow outcome.

followUpTasks.title: Add channel progress review routing fixture
followUpTasks.summary: Create a fixture that shows an inbound channel batch being reviewed with routed workflow evidence.
followUpTasks.acceptanceEvidence: Progress-review workflow test or fixture artifact showing the inbound channel batch and resulting review action.

ownerQuestions.question: Should channel progress reviews require rendered message fixtures for every channel batch?
ownerQuestions.reason: The current evidence shows channel activity but not the operator-visible routed outcome.
